Selbst im Solo-Mode: dieses Template erzwingt einen kurzen Selbst-Review.
Nicht zutreffende Felder mit "n/a" ausfüllen, nicht löschen.
-->

## Summary

- **What changed:**
- **Why:**
- **Risk level:** low | medium | high

## Validation

- [ ] import / CLI gate passed
- [ ] relevant unit tests passed
- [ ] relevant contract tests passed
- [ ] wiki-lint passed or findings documented
- [ ] golden / eval tests passed where relevant
- [ ] read-model rebuild passed where relevant
- [ ] UI smoke passed where relevant
- [ ] secret scan passed
- [ ] fresh-state considered
- [ ] evolved-state considered

## Evidence

- **Latest quality gate run:**
- **Relevant logs / artifact folder:**

- **Sample source / proposal / page IDs:**

## Documentation

- [ ] PROJECT_STATE updated
- [ ] ARD updated if architecture changed
- [ ] ADR added / updated if decision changed
- [ ] RUNBOOK updated if operation changed
- [ ] PROMPT_REGISTRY updated if prompt changed
- [ ] SOURCE_POLICY updated if source handling changed
- [ ] Handoff updated if session boundary relevant

## Safety

- [ ] no private Raw Sources accidentally included
- [ ] no secrets committed
- [ ] agent did not directly publish unreviewed content
- [ ] copyright / source policy considered
